reference: I have upper left pain in my stomach and soreness to touch on the left side of my central stomach. I often feel pain in the left side and right side that radiates to my back. The other pain I have been experiencing is in the upper center and out my back. I had this twice. It goes away as quickly as I feel it, and I get burps all the time with it. I suppose it sounds at the time like trapped wind. I had a colonoscopy and endoscopy a couple of months ago, and as far as I know, all was fine.
text: I have upper left pain in my stomach and soreness to touch on the left side of my central stomach. I often feel pain in the left side and right side that radiates my back. The other pain I have been experiencing is in the upper center and out my back. I had this twice. It goes away as quickly as I feel it, and I get hurt all the time with it. I suppose it sounds at the time like trapped wind. I had a colonoscopy and endoscopy a couple of months ago, and as far as I know, all was fine.
